steps: The equation 4x + 3y = 24 models Mario's purchase: 4 binders at x dollars each plus 3 notebooks at y dollars each.
4x is the total binder cost; 3y is the total notebook cost. Their sum equals 24.
Therefore 24 is the total cost for all binders and notebooks combined.
choiceElimination:
• Choice A — 'The total cost, in dollars, for all binders purchased': Total binder cost is 4x, not 24. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The total cost, in dollars, for all notebooks purchased': Total notebook cost is 3y, not 24. ✗
  • Choice C — 'The total cost, in dollars, for all binders and notebooks purchased': 4x + 3y = 24 adds both costs, so 24 is the combined total. ✓
  • Choice D — 'The difference in the total cost, in dollars, between the number of binders and notebooks purchased': A difference uses subtraction; this equation uses addition. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
